payload.title: Migration: name PRIVATE cross-file calls too (not just pub)
payload.description: RT-110/111 boundary: the migration's workspace index is pub-only (sig_index::extract_from_source), so a PRIVATE fn called across files in the same crate doesn't get named — those residual R0042s surface at cargo trustc build. Within a workspace we can see every fn, so add an all-fns extraction variant and use it for the *migration* index (trust fix tree). NB: the cross-CRATE auto-index (RT-114) must stay pub-only — private fns aren't callable across crates.
